named_overlay_targets.label: Practice surface
named_overlay_targets.description: Center the practice surface inside the framing area.

named_overlay_targets.label: Driver grip
named_overlay_targets.description: Where the needle driver grip should stay stable.

named_overlay_targets.label: Entry point
named_overlay_targets.description: The expected starting point for the first bite.

named_overlay_targets.label: Needle angle
named_overlay_targets.description: Visual guide for a more perpendicular entry angle.

named_overlay_targets.label: Exit point
named_overlay_targets.description: Where the needle tip should emerge on the far side.

named_overlay_targets.label: Thread path
named_overlay_targets.description: Keep the suture line visible and controlled as you pull through.

named_overlay_targets.label: Knot center
named_overlay_targets.description: Target spot for a centered final knot.

named_overlay_targets.label: Wound line center
named_overlay_targets.description: The midline that the stitch should visually align with.

stages.title: Setup
stages.objective: Prepare the surface and tools so the practice field is clearly framed.

stages.title: Grip
stages.objective: Hold the needle driver with a stable grip before entry.
common_errors: grip too close to the tip

stages.title: Needle Entry
stages.objective: Approach the surface at a confident entry angle for the first bite.
common_errors: needle not aligned with the practice line

stages.title: Needle Exit
stages.objective: Complete the arc so the needle exits across the wound line.
visible_checks: arc completed across the wound line

stages.title: Pull Through
stages.objective: Pull the suture through without losing control of tension.

stages.title: Knot Tie
stages.objective: Form a centered knot that looks neat in the practice field.

stages.title: Final Check
stages.objective: Review the finished stitch for overall presentation and alignment.
visible_checks: knot and wound line are visible
